User.description: Represents a user in the EasyKonnect platform. Users can be service users (customers) or service providers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

email.description: User's email address. Used for authentication and notifications.

role.description: User's role in the platform. Determines access permissions.

status.description: Current account status. PENDING accounts require email verification.

isEmailVerified.description: Whether the user has verified their email address

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the account was created (ISO 8601 format)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

AuthResponse.description: Response returned after successful login. Contains user data and authentication tokens.

accessToken.description: JWT access token for API authentication. Include in Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>'. Expires in 7 days.

refreshToken.description: JWT refresh token for obtaining new access tokens. Expires in 30 days.

RegistrationResponse.description: Response returned after user registration. Indicates email verification is required.

message.description: Human-readable message about the registration status

requiresVerification.description: Always true - indicates user must verify their email before logging in

VerifyEmailResponse.description: Response returned after email verification. On success, includes authentication tokens.

user.description: User profile (only present on successful verification)

accessToken.description: JWT access token (only present on successful verification)

refreshToken.description: JWT refresh token (only present on successful verification)

MessageResponse.description: Generic response for operations that don't return specific data.

RefreshTokenResponse.description: Response returned when refreshing an access token.

PaginatedUsers.description: Paginated list of users. Used for admin user management.

items.description: Array of users for the current page

total.description: Total number of users matching the query

hasNextPage.description: Whether there are more pages after this one

hasPreviousPage.description: Whether there are pages before this one

RegisterUserInput.description: Input for creating a new user account

email.description: Valid email address. Will receive verification OTP.

password.description: Password (minimum 8 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, and number)

VerifyEmailInput.description: Input for verifying email with OTP code

email.description: Email address that received the OTP

ResendOtpInput.description: Input for requesting a new verification OTP

email.description: Email address to send the new OTP to

ForgotPasswordInput.description: Input for requesting a password reset

email.description: Email address of the account to reset

ResetPasswordInput.description: Input for resetting password with OTP verification

newPassword.description: New password (minimum 8 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, and number)

UpdateProfileInput.description: Input for updating user profile. All fields are optional.

limit.description: Number of items per page (default: 10, max: 100)

UserRole.description: Defines the user's role and access level in the platform

SERVICE_USER.description: Regular user who can browse and book services

SERVICE_PROVIDER.description: User who offers services on the platform

SUPER_ADMIN.description: Super administrator with full system access

AccountStatus.description: Current status of the user's account

PENDING.description: Account created but email not yet verified

ACTIVE.description: Account is active and can access all features

UNVERIFIED.description: Provider has not submitted verification documents

PENDING.description: Verification documents submitted and under review

REJECTED.description: Verification rejected - provider needs to resubmit

BookingStatus.description: Current status of a service booking

PENDING.description: Booking request submitted, awaiting provider response

CANCELLED.description: Booking was cancelled by user or provider

DISPUTED.description: There is a dispute regarding this booking

PaymentStatus.description: Current status of a payment transaction

PENDING.description: Payment initiated but not yet processed

me.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile. Requires authentication.

user.description: Get a specific user by their ID. Requires authentication.

id.description: The unique ID of the user to retrieve

users.description: Get a paginated list of all users. Requires ADMIN role.

register.description: Register a new user account. A 6-digit verification code will be sent to the provided email address. The user must verify their email before they can log in.

verifyEmail.description: Verify email address using the 6-digit OTP code sent during registration. On success, returns authentication tokens so the user is automatically logged in.

resendVerificationOtp.description: Request a new verification OTP code. Use this if the original code expired (codes expire after 10 minutes) or was not received.

input.description: Email address to resend OTP to

login.description: Authenticate a user and receive access tokens. The user's email must be verified before login is allowed. Failed login attempts are tracked - after 5 failed attempts, the account is locked for 30 minutes.

refreshToken.description: Get a new access token using a valid refresh token. Use this when the access token has expired but you still have a valid refresh token.
The refresh token received during login or email verification

forgotPassword.description: Request a password reset. A 6-digit reset code will be sent to the email if an account exists. For security, this always returns success even if the email is not registered.

resetPassword.description: Reset password using the 6-digit code sent via forgotPassword. The code expires after 10 minutes.

input.description: Email, reset code, and new password

updateProfile.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information. Only provided fields will be updated. Requires authentication.

deleteUser.description: Delete a user account. Requires ADMIN role. This action cannot be undone.

id.description: ID of the user to delete
